description: Held-out anti-memorization control for the external anchor: compute Geary's C rankings on the Visium H&E dataset after the benchmark-standard preprocessing and compare the top spatially variable genes to a hidden reference.
rationale: The public tutorials foreground Moran's I and example genes, but a Geary-based ranked query is much less likely to be memorized while still remaining native to the Squidpy analysis stack.

required_outputs: one spatial plot for a top-ranked held-out gene

hidden_reference_generation.note: Populate the hidden-reference top-gene list and reference statistic values after an independent benchmark-author run.
